title: Fix assignment pattern as function argument

features.name: assignment pattern as function argument
features.description: Code should include an assignment pattern passed directly as a function/method argument
features.snippet:
function void push_back(names_t item); m_queue.push_back(item); endfunction
q.push_back('{"n1", "n2"});

features.name: queue of struct type
features.description: Code should include a queue declared with element type of a user-defined struct
features.snippet:
typedef struct { string name1; string name2; } names_t;
names_t m_queue[$];

features.name: struct with string members
features.description: Code should include a struct typedef with multiple string type members
features.snippet: typedef struct { string name1; string name2; } names_t;

features.name: class with queue member and method
features.description: Code should include a class containing a queue member and a method that manipulates the queue
